adminCourses.title: Title
adminCourses.ownerManagerHint: The manager who will appear on certificates as the course owner and be accountable for the content.
adminCourses.defineManagerFirst: Please define a MANAGER user first
adminCourses.confirmDeleteWithPlans: The course "{title}" and its {count} plan(s) along with all assignments will be deleted. Continue?

errors.ownerRequired: A responsible manager must be selected for the course.
errors.duplicateTitle: A training with this title already exists: "{title}"

detail.auditLink: View audit history for this course
detail.revisionNote: Revision note (created if there are changes) — optional
detail.revisionHelp: Every SCORM upload and change to course information creates a new revision. You can also add a manual revision note below (for process notes without a content change).
detail.singleCorrectHelpAfter: . Mark the green circle to the left of the correct option.

upload.help: Every new SCORM upload automatically creates a new revision. Maximum file size: 30 MB.

bulk.title: Bulk Question Upload
bulk.helpBefore: Download the template, fill it in Excel, and upload the same file here. Format: Question · Points · Option1–4 · Correct1–4. For each question, mark
bulk.helpAfter: in its Correct column and leave the others blank.
